All tokens inferred from the design-context React/Tailwind code (Stage 1 capture).
Hex values taken from each swatch frame's inner `bg-[#xxxxxx]` Tailwind class; for `bg-white` swatches the canonical hex from the printed token label (#FFFFFF) was used.
Source frame names with whitespace ('brand lite') or underscores ('brand_dark') were normalized to hyphenated token slugs ('color/brand-lite', 'color/brand-dark').
Token 'color/text-teritary' preserves the misspelling found in the Figma frame (source-of-truth fidelity).
